steps.instruction: Place the ruler so the 0 mark is at one end of the book.
steps.work: Left edge of book at 0 inches.
steps.explanation: Always start measuring from the 0 mark, not the edge of the ruler.

steps.instruction: Look where the other end of the book reaches on the ruler.
steps.work: The right edge reaches the 9-inch mark.
steps.explanation: Read the number where the object ends.
Always include the unit (inches) so others know what tool you used.

steps.instruction: A table is 2 feet long. A bench is 30 inches long. Which is longer?
steps.explanation: To compare, both measurements must use the same unit.

steps.instruction: Convert feet to inches: 1 foot = 12 inches.
steps.explanation: Multiply the number of feet by 12 to get inches.

steps.work: 30 > 24, so the bench is longer by 6 inches.
steps.explanation: 30 − 24 = 6. The bench is 6 inches longer than the table.
